rim_no: Unique customer ID assigned in the core system
rim_type: Type of customer record (e.g., Individual or Corporate)
class_code: Internal classification of customer segment or type
birth_city: City of birth of the customer
country_code: ISO or internal code for the country
age: Age of the customer (derived from birth_date)
resident_city: City where the customer currently resides
created_dt: Date when customer record was created
closed_dt: Date when customer record was closed (if applicable)
status: Current status of the customer account
employer_category: Sector or category of the employer
clean_employer_name: Cleaned/formatted employer name for consistent reporting
class_code (duplicate): (Redundant column; should be normalized or removed)
business_unit: Associated business unit managing the customer
id_proof_type: Type of official ID used for KYC
id_expiry_date: Expiry date of the ID document
kyc_verification_date: Date on which KYC was last verified
kyc_status: If kyc is completed or not
is_kyc_verified: it is a flag column which denotes if the KYC is verified
mobile_app_flag: denotes if the customer has registered for the imobile app
